blocs.note: Historical arithmetic aggregation only. It does not imply transferability between parties.

notes: No declaration is loaded. This profile is a live/pre-poll ingestion target.

archive.methodology_note: Live Ol Kalou forms are downloaded and OCR-prefilled through the same county-to-stream hierarchy used for Banissa. OCR remains review-only; unresolved reference rows prevent automatic publication.

ocr.note: OCR output is a pre-fill only. Handwritten cells are read with layout anchors and arithmetic reconciliation, but no historical stream is added to the public tally until human review and statutory validation are complete.

portal_sync.message: New or changed IEBC forms were downloaded and the dashboard was rebuilt.
